Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The Shape of Inequalities 39 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Afroman Wins Civil Trial over Use of Police Raid Footage in His Music Videos 330 upvotes, 58 comments
  3. A Preview of Coalton 0.2 32 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Consensus Board Game 50 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. Gluon: Explicit Performance 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Wander – A tiny, decentralised tool to explore the small web 336 upvotes, 78 comments
  7. Pretraining Language Models via Neural Cellular Automata 70 upvotes, 12 comments
  8. Conway's Game of Life, in real life 275 upvotes, 72 comments
  9. Nvidia greenboost: transparently extend GPU VRAM using system RAM/NVMe 443 upvotes, 124 comments
  10. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 101 upvotes, 26 comments
  11. How many branches can your CPU predict? 84 upvotes, 22 comments
  12. Show HN: Duplicate 3 layers in a 24B LLM, logical deduction .22→.76. No training 208 upvotes, 72 comments
  13. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 126 upvotes, 43 comments
  14. Afroman found not liable in defamation case 820 upvotes, 382 comments
  15. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 47 upvotes, 14 comments
  16. Juggalo Makeup Blocks Facial Recognition Technology (2019) 150 upvotes, 70 comments
  17. A sufficiently detailed spec is code 533 upvotes, 288 comments
  18. Eniac, the First General-Purpose Digital Computer, Turns 80 85 upvotes, 36 comments
  19. Ramtrack.eu – RAM Price Intelligence 27 upvotes, 8 comments
  20. LotusNotes 155 upvotes, 82 comments
  21. Hyper-optimized reverse geocoding API 23 upvotes, 7 comments
  22. Astral to Join OpenAI 697 upvotes, 441 comments
  23. Prompt Injecting Contributing.md 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. The next fight over the use of facial recognition could be in the supermarkets 46 upvotes, 24 comments
  26. Stdwin: Standard window interface by Guido Van Rossum [pdf] 68 upvotes, 41 comments
  27. 2% of ICML papers desk rejected because the authors used LLM in their reviews 168 upvotes, 139 comments
  28. What if Python was natively distributable? 8 upvotes, 2 comments
  29. Show HN: Mavera – Predict audience response with GANs, not LLM sentiment 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  30. Austin’s surge of new housing construction drove down rents 718 upvotes, 855 comments

Last generated 1:00am, 20 March 2026. Source here.
